tagline: Your Premiere Pool and Spa Dealer in Oshkosh WI

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool Starts Right Here
in Oshkosh
hero.subheadline: From the first design consultation to your first cannonball, Water City Pool And Spa handles every detail. Inground pools, hot tubs, saunas, and expert water care — all backed by 11 years of trusted service across Northeastern Wisconsin.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Pools, Hot Tubs & Saunas<br class="hidden md:block">All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Whether you are building your first pool or maintaining a backyard oasis, Water City Pool And Spa brings the expertise, premium brands, and hands-on service to make it happen.

cards.title: Inground Pool Installation
cards.description: Fully customizable inground pools from excavation through final walkthrough. Partnered with Imagine Pools, Leading Edge, Imperial, and Latham for fiberglass and vinyl options.

cards.title: Above Ground Pools
cards.description: Affordable above ground pool sales and expert installation from trusted brands like Doughboy and Embassy Pools. Perfect for families ready to splash in this season.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Premium hot tub sales featuring Artesian Spas, Hydropool, and more. Expert guidance to find the right fit for relaxation, with professional delivery and setup.

cards.title: Saunas
cards.description: Indoor and outdoor sauna solutions built for health and wellness. Browse quality options designed to complement your home and daily routine.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Service
cards.description: Comprehensive maintenance, repair, and liner replacement. Heater fixes, pump swaps, and seasonal care handled by our experienced technicians.

cards.title: Free Water Testing
cards.description: Complimentary water testing with personalized chemical recommendations. Keep your pool or spa crystal clear and balanced all season long.

how_it_works.headline: From Dream to Dive in Three Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your backyard vision. We will walk you through pool, spa, and sauna options that fit your space, style, and budget — no pressure, just honest guidance.

steps.title: We Design & Install
steps.description: Our team handles every detail from custom design through excavation, installation, and final walkthrough. Premium brands and expert craftsmanship at every stage.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Dive into your new pool, unwind in your hot tub, or relax in your sauna. We stay with you for ongoing water care, maintenance, and support year after year.

about.label: Why Oshkosh Trusts Us
about.headline: Locally Owned, Personally Invested in Every Project
about.description: Founded by Jeff in 2015, Water City Pool And Spa has grown into the Fox Valley's trusted destination for pools, hot tubs, and saunas. We partner with premium brands like Imagine Pools, Artesian Spas, Hydropool, Hayward, and Pentair because your backyard deserves the best. Every customer gets personalized attention from our knowledgeable team — from the first water test to years of ongoing care.

features.title: Premium Brand Partners
features.description: We carry Imagine Pools, Artesian Spas, Hydropool, Hayward, and Pentair — brands trusted by pool and spa owners nationwide.

features.title: Free Water Testing for All
features.description: Bring in a sample anytime. We test your water and provide personalized chemical recommendations at no charge — whether you bought from us or not.

features.title: Full-Service Start to Finish
features.description: From initial design consultation through excavation, installation, and final walkthrough, our team handles every step so you do not have to.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Financing Available.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. Get a custom quote tailored to your backyard, budget, and goals — with flexible financing options to make it affordable.

guarantee.headline: Our Customer Satisfaction Promise
guarantee.description: Your satisfaction is our reputation. If any service or installation does not meet your expectations, we will make it right. Our team stands behind every pool, spa, and sauna we sell and service — because in a community like Oshkosh, trust is everything.

faqs.question: How long does an inground pool installation take?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool installations take 4-8 weeks depending on the design, permits, and weather. We walk you through every phase from excavation to final walkthrough so you always know what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pools and hot tubs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to fit your budget. Talk to our team during your free consultation and we will walk you through available plans to make your dream backyard affordable.

faqs.question: What brands of hot tubs and pools do you carry?
faqs.answer: We partner with premium brands including Imagine Pools, Leading Edge Pools, Artesian Spas, Hydropool, Hayward, and Pentair. We select brands based on quality, warranty, and long-term reliability.

faqs.question: Do you service pools and spas you did not install?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our service team handles maintenance, repairs, liner replacements, and water testing for any pool or spa — regardless of where it was purchased or installed.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Oshkosh, Appleton, Neenah, Menasha, Fond du Lac, and the entire Fox Valley region of Northeastern Wisconsin. Contact us to confirm service availability in your area.

testimonials.name: Shelly B.
testimonials.text: Water City Pool and Spa replaced my liner and pump this week. No easy task with a buried pool. Everything looks beautiful. They are knowledgeable and friendly.

testimonials.name: Steve R.
testimonials.text: This is the place to go if you have a pool. Joel is awesome! They made managing chemicals easy with weekly supply bundles. I will be a customer for life due to this kind of service.

testimonials.name: Sheila W.
testimonials.text: Everyone at Water City is kind and friendly. Our Hot Tub heater was not working. They addressed the problem fast with the cold weather.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Backyard Paradise?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation from the Water City team. We will help you find the perfect pool, hot tub, or sauna for your home and budget.

footer.description: Locally owned pool and spa dealer. Serving Oshkosh and the Fox Valley since 2015.
